title: Process just-received packet with post-await timestamp before pruning on maintenance
description: In the runtime loop, after awaiting a receive, use the post-await timestamp to process the received packet BEFORE running maintenance/pruning. Still perform maintenance on timeout or error paths. Ensure exact timeout boundaries in tests.
close_reason: fixed ordering of post-await packet processing before maintenance in runtime_receive; errors from process_received now also trigger maintenance; tests use exact boundaries
